ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s payment ecosystem, with a surge in stablecoin activity and a notable jump in SOL’s market cap. The network is also seeing renewed interest in ecosystem journalism following recent disruptions.
ctxTalking:
• Jito Foundation’s acquisition of SolanaFloor after its shutdown due to a treasury breach at Step Finance
• Solana’s market cap rising by $5B, with Mutuum Finance V1 reaching $200M in TVL
• Aon’s stablecoin payment test using PayPal USD on Solana
ctxMatters: Solana’s payment infrastructure is attracting institutional experiments and significant user growth. The revival of Solana-focused media may improve information flow for the ecosystem. High TVL and stablecoin activity highlight Solana’s expanding role in DeFi and payments.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Surge in payment volume and institutional stablecoin tests on Solana.
Noise: Speculation around SOL price targets without clear attribution.
ctxGlossary:
TVL — Total Value Locked, a measure of assets deposited in DeFi protocols.
Stablecoin — A cryptocurrency pegged to a stable asset, often used for payments and settlements.

readMore.title: Jito Foundation acquires SolanaFloor days after platform shutdown
Solana Market Cap Jumps $5B, Can SOL Reclaim $100 as Mutuum Finance V1 Protocol Hits $200M TVL?
Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
